name: Vengold Inc.
description: Vengold Inc. was a Canadian-based mining company primarily known for its interest in the Lihir Gold project in Papua New Guinea. During its operational history, the company underwent a significant strategic shift, transitioning from a traditional mining focus to becoming an internet incubator. Following this pivot, the company eventually changed its name to Itemus Inc. As a historical entity, Vengold was listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) under the ticker symbol VNG. Its legacy is largely associated with its early involvement in large-scale gold mining ventures and its subsequent evolution during the dot-com era.
